rule_text: Lisraya brand voice has three pillars: Confident, not boastful (state first-of-its-kind significance clearly and directly, never overstated or sensationalized); Warm, not overly emotional (genuine empathy about DM's daily impact, patients at the center); and Clear, not complicated (plain, respectful language that is easy to understand without losing accuracy). Tone may flex slightly by context, but the core voice never changes.
intent: Keep messaging on-voice: credible, empathetic, and plain across all contexts.
summary: Lisraya brand voice is confident (direct, factual), warm (genuine empathy, patient-centered), and clear (plain, respectful language), flexing slightly by context but core tone constant.
